description: Reusable metric-level extraction and interpretation patterns. Active rules may be applied before GPT; candidate rules are evidence for reviewers and future promotion.

promotion_policy.notes: A rule is not active merely because GPT suggested it. It needs repeated verified observations and low contradiction rate.

observations: May be derived from purchase date and exit date
Usually between 3 and 10 years for acquisition underwriting
Values greater than 24 are often month counts unless a year unit is explicitly stated

pattern.condition: metric == 'hold_period' and numeric_value > 24 and unit_label is absent

observations: Debt amount, spread, cap, maturity, and amortization may live on inputs or assumptions tabs rather than dedicated debt tabs
Floating-rate debt should preserve spread, index, and cap strike as separate concepts

pattern.condition: role == 'inputs' and labels include any of ['loan', 'debt', 'ltv', 'spread', 'sofr', 'libor', 'cap']

observations: NOI may be presented monthly in retail and hotel operating tabs
Annualized NOI should not mix monthly columns with annual columns without an explicit period conversion

pattern.condition: metric contains 'NOI' and column_headers are months

interpretation.annualization: sum twelve monthly periods or multiply representative stabilized month by 12 only when explicitly supported
